meta.note: Flat catalog keyed by model_name. hash = joaat(model_name). dlc = { id, name, releaseDate } (source update; releaseDate is the DLC launch date). stats = curated handling values (topSpeed, driveForce, brakeForce, traction, mass, drivetrain, monetaryValue, …).
